# Acme Catalog

---
title: Acme Catalog
url: http://localhost:4321/
type: index
summary: Acme Catalog — 500 products grouped into 8 categories.
---

# Acme Catalog

Root of the categorized catalog graph. 500 products live under 8 category index nodes (footwear, apparel, kitchen, tools, outdoor, office, lighting, audio).

Agents that respect the subtree contract walk root → category → product and never have to load the flat index. Cross-cutting tags remain on every product node for filters orthogonal to category.


---
title: Footwear
url: http://localhost:4321/c/footwear/
type: index
summary: Footwear — 62 products grouped under the footwear category.
---

# Footwear

Subtree fanout for the footwear category. Walking this subtree returns the category node plus its 62 product children — agents looking for footwear can fetch this scope without scanning the flat catalog index.

title: Apparel
url: http://localhost:4321/c/apparel/

---

# Apparel

Subtree fanout for the apparel category. Walking this subtree returns the category node plus its 63 product children — agents looking for apparel can fetch this scope without scanning the flat catalog index.

---
title: Summit Jacket — Brick
url: http://localhost:4321/p/sku-000001/
type: product
summary: Summit jacket in brick; built in Japan for daily use.
---

# Summit Jacket — Brick

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Summit Jacket — Brick is designed for the long haul, with apparel-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Japan.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.

```json
{"weight_g":899,"materials":{"upper":"full-grain leather","sole":"oak-tanned leather","lining":"vegetable-tanned calfskin"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"Japan","sizes_us":[8,8.5,9,9.5,10,10.5,11,11.5,12]}
```

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.

- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

{"weight_g":845,"materials":{"upper":"ripstop nylon","sole":"aluminum poles","lining":"mesh inner"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"Portugal","length_cm":11}

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Spain.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.

```json
{"weight_g":1578,"materials":{"upper":"cast iron","sole":"forged steel","lining":"enameled cast iron"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"Spain","length_cm":31}
```

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Northwind Tent — Pine is designed for the long haul, with outdoor-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Vietnam.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.

```json
{"weight_g":451,"materials":{"upper":"cast iron","sole":"forged steel","lining":"enameled cast iron"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"Vietnam","capacity":"4-person"}
```
